headline: Walmart CEO Shift Puts Valuation And Growth Priorities In Focus
summary: Walmart has appointed John Furner as its new CEO, succeeding Doug McMillon. The leadership change comes as large U.S. companies overhaul executive teams in response to rapid industry shifts. Investors are watching for how the new CEO will approach private-label products, omnichannel growth, and technology use. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WMT, this leadership transition arrives after a strong multi year share performance, with the stock up 37.8% over the past year and 200.1% over five...
